steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage focuses on what the Aspera mission will achieve: using a new telescope to observe warm-hot CGM gas that “haven't previously been observable,” which is crucial to understanding galaxy evolution.

steps.title: Match the answer to the signal
steps.content:
Choice D — The Aspera mission is expected to produce the first direct observations of CGM gas in the "warm-hot" phase, which likely has an important role in the evolution of galaxies. states that Aspera will produce “the first direct observations” of warm-hot CGM gas, which “likely has an important role in the evolution of galaxies.” This directly reflects the passage's focus on a mission delivering a new observation of previously-invisible material critical to galaxy evolution.

The other choices either focus on a person, describe only the current limitation, or generalize about incomplete understanding without the Aspera mission.

That matches Choice D — The Aspera mission is expected to produce the first direct observations of CGM gas in the "warm-hot" phase, which likely has an important role in the evolution of galaxies..
